  • For Operations Leaders
For Plant Directors & Operations Managers

Stop paying for failures you could have prevented.

SAM4 detects rotating asset failures 4-8 weeks early. Eliminate unplanned downtime, recover lost capacity, and prove 800% ROI to the board.

Calculate Your ROI See How Companies Like Yours Saved

Every unplanned shutdown has a price. Most plants pay it repeatedly.

Average cost per failure: 50,000 euros or more. Most industrial plants run blind to 30-40% of critical assets. A single preventable shutdown can erase a year's margin. SAM4 changes that by giving operations teams the foresight to act before motors fail, bearings seize, or gearboxes break.

Named customers. Quantified outcomes.

Yorkshire Water

35 pollution incidents prevented. 70,000 manual inspections replaced. 10 million pounds avoided.

Schiphol Airport

Baggage handling motor bearing degradation caught months early. Unplanned downtime reduced from 3+ hours to zero.

Nyrstar

Critical smelter asset failures detected weeks early. Avoided 2.1 million euros in emergency repairs.

800%
ROI (first 3 years)
6-12 mo
payback period
50K+
saved per detection
4-8 wks
early warning

From pilot to fleet. Here's how it works.

1

Install

Clip sensors onto power cables at the motor control cabinet. Less than 60 minutes. Same-shift deployment.

2

Baseline

Platform learns asset signatures over 2-4 weeks.

3

Detect

Anomaly alerts 4-8 weeks before failure. Every alert reviewed by a Samotics engineer.

4

Act

Maintenance plans the shutdown on your schedule, not the asset's.

See what SAM4 saves your plant.

Book a demo to see live detection data. Then run a free ROI estimate for your critical assets.

Calculate Your ROI See How Companies Like Yours Saved

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
